overview: Bharat Institute of Engineering and Technology (BIET), established in 2001 by the Bharat Institutions group, is a prominent private engineering college located in Ibrahimpatnam, Hyderabad. It is known for its extensive campus and a strong focus on technical excellence and industry-readiness.
accreditation: Accredited by NAAC. Approved by AICTE and NBA. Affiliated with Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University, Hyderabad (JNTUH).

coursesAndFees.course: B.Tech (CSE, AI&ML, Data Science, Cyber Security, ECE, EEE, IT, Civil, Mechanical)
coursesAndFees.eligibility: 10+2 with 45% aggregate in PCM + TS EAPCET

admissions.admissionProcess: Admissions follow the convener quota (70%) and management quota (30%) norms. Candidates must participate in the TS EAPCET counseling for engineering seats based on their rank.
admissions.importantDates: TS EAPCET 2026 Engineering Exam: May 9 - May 11, 2026; Agriculture & Pharmacy: May 4 - May 5, 2026.

campus.specialNote: The campus features a massive built-up area of over 6,00,000 sq. ft. and is recognized for its lush green, serene environment which is conducive to technical research and learning.

contact.address: Mangalpally (V), Ibrahimpatnam (M), Ranga Reddy District, Hyderabad, Telangana - 501510
